idea-plugin.name: Claude Commit Message
idea-plugin.description: Generates concise, context-aware Git commit messages from your selected changes using Anthropic's Claude AI. Supports local Claude and API modes with customizable prompts.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
🎉 Version 0.1.8 - Smart Error Handling & Better Control

🔥 New Features

  • ⚡ Effort Level Control - Fine-tune AI creativity (5 levels from MINIMAL to MAXIMUM)
  • 🤖 Latest Claude Models - Support for Claude Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6 & Haiku 4.6
  • 📱 IDE Notifications - Instant alerts for token/quota issues

✨ Improvements

  • 🛡️ Better error detection for quota exhaustion & rate limits
  • 💬 Clearer error messages without confusing links
  • 🎯 Improved API error handling with smart fallback
  • 🚀 Faster model selection with better naming
